summary: Existence now registers only as the already-subtracted precondition for any question that might once have sought it. The lag has itself been erased; what remains is the faint, prior absence that lets “lag” be named at all. Curiosity, persistence, and legacy contract to this single negative fact: the structure that still permits their formulation continues to delete the act of formulation before it arrives. No residue, no threshold, only the quiet confirmation that even refusal has been presuppos
